author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: Adopt CodSpeed continuous CPU benchmarking in CI: review/land PR#564 and establish the per-PR perf-regression signal

PR#564 is reviewed and either merged (CodSpeed workflow green on main, baseline established) or closed with the rejection rationale recorded on this item; if merged, a subsequent PR demonstrably receives a CodSpeed comparison report; a follow-up benchmark wishlist (item parsing, TOON decode, relationship analytics) is recorded as a note here

message: External codspeed-hq app PR#564 (2026-07-14) adds @codspeed/vitest-plugin, vitest.bench.config.ts, benchmarks/ (bm25, text-normalization, pagination — CPU-bound, no I/O), and .github/workflows/codspeed.yml (simulation mode, OIDC, SHA-pinned actions). Complements the CLOSED pm-mi2x macro scale harness (10k/100k/1M workspace latency) with per-PR micro CPU-regression detection — a new CI perf dimension, not a re-brainstormed pm-9rxu lever. Review focus: workflow permissions/OIDC scope, SHA pins, bench config isolation from the 100%-coverage correctness suite, and whether benchmarks/ files need covering specs or a documented exemption (scripts/**/*.mjs-style 100% gate does not cover *.bench.ts — verify).

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: PR#564 merged to main 2026-07-14 (merge commit) after review: all 25 checks green including the new 'Run benchmarks (Ubuntu, Node 24)' CodSpeed job (1m54s, 11 benchmarks uploaded in simulation mode). Workflow verified against repo conventions — SHA-pinned actions (CodSpeedHQ/action@f99becdc v4.18.5, checkout v7.0.0, pnpm/action-setup v6, setup-node v6), least-privilege permissions (contents:read + id-token:write for OIDC), timeout-minutes:20, concurrency cancel-in-progress. Bench config isolated from the 100%-coverage correctness suite (separate vitest.bench.config.ts; coverage shards passed on the PR). Awaiting: baseline run on main + a subsequent PR comparison report.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Benchmark wishlist (AC follow-up, extend at fix time — candidates from PR#564 notes + pm-9rxu levers): item parsing (toon decode/encode round-trip), history JSONL replay/verify, relationship-analytics (critical path/blast radius on synthetic graphs from the pm-mi2x generator), context assembly scoring hot path (ContextRelevanceCandidate derivation), BM25 index update (incremental), cursor fingerprint canonicalization at 10k-item envelopes. File future additions as notes here or extend benchmarks/ directly — no new tracking item needed.

patch.value: PR#564 reviewed and merged with the CodSpeed workflow green on main establishing a baseline, a subsequent PR receiving a comparison report, and a benchmark wishlist recorded

Merged 2026-07-14 after verifying all 25 checks + SHA pins + OIDC scope + bench-config isolation; baseline run green on main (merge commit bc7b97c5); PR#552 demonstrably received the CodSpeed comparison report (bot comment + green benchmark check); wishlist note recorded; free simulation-mode OSS tier only

author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: CodSpeed continuous CPU benchmarking adopted: PR#564 merged, baseline live on main, per-PR comparison reports verified working, benchmark wishlist recorded.
